message:
fix: add CLAUDE.local.md to gitignore patterns (fix-merge PR #3275)

Co-Authored-By: Cherub Kumar <cherub.chopra@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -400,7 +400,7 @@ func TestEnsureGitignorePatterns_AllPatternsPresent(t *testing.T) {
 	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
 
 	// Create existing .gitignore with all required patterns.
-	existing := ".runtime/
.claude/
.beads/
.logs/
__pycache__/
state.json
CLAUDE.md
"
+	existing := ".runtime/
.claude/
.beads/
.logs/
__pycache__/
state.json
CLAUDE.md
CLAUDE.local.md
"
 	if err := os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(tmpDir, ".gitignore"), []byte(existing), 0644); err != nil {
 		t.Fatalf("Failed to create .gitignore: %v", err)
 	}
@@ -430,7 +430,7 @@ func TestEnsureGitignorePatterns_NarrowPatternPresent(t *testing.T) {
 	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
 
 	// Create .gitignore with the exact required patterns
-	existing := ".runtime/
.claude/
.logs/
__pycache__/
state.json
CLAUDE.md
"
+	existing := ".runtime/
.claude/
.logs/
__pycache__/
state.json
CLAUDE.md
CLAUDE.local.md
"
 	if err := os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(tmpDir, ".gitignore"), []byte(existing), 0644); err != nil {
 		t.Fatalf("Failed to create .gitignore: %v", err)
 	}
